original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Alexander, Joseph, Ava, and Lucas. Alexander said, "Joseph is a knight." Joseph remarked, "Ava is a knave if and only if Lucas is a knave". Ava commented, "Joseph is not a knave". "Alexander is a knight or Ava is a knight," Lucas declared. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
